personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Capacity Planning & AI-Driven Infrastructure Optimization
personal.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

summary: Senior Data Engineer with over 20 years of enterprise experience, specializing in data analysis, tool development, and cross-functional collaboration. Proficient in Python, SQL, and AWS, I excel at managing and analyzing data to support critical business decisions. My expertise includes developing innovative tools for operational efficiency and driving project success through collaboration with diverse teams. I have a proven track record in cloud computing and advanced programming, delivering impactful solutions at scale. I am eager to contribute to 0’s mission by leveraging my technical skills to support innovative projects and business growth.

flagship_projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
flagship_projects.description: Designed a full serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, and Bedrock. Built a Text-to-SQL GenAI agent with Claude 3 Sonnet. Resolved small file issues using Snappy and Parquet compression. Optimized ETL and data access for enterprise scale.

flagship_projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
flagship_projects.description: Replaced legacy manual processes with a parallel generator-based pipeline, reducing forecasting cycles by 90%. Developed an interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights and 'High Trust' utilization scores. Created a modern agentic pipeline for banking-scale telemetry.

flagship_projects.name: FAST Project
flagship_projects.description: Conducted data mining on user performance metrics to optimize critical money-generating systems.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated ETL pipelines using Python and Pandas to ingest P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, enhancing data analysis for business decisions.
Developed ML forecasting models with Prophet and scikit-learn to predict bottlenecks 6 months ahead, supporting operational efficiency.
Integrated disparate data feeds into unified Oracle reporting systems with executive dashboards for cross-functional collaboration.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas for historical data retention, enabling seasonal risk forecasting.
Identified underutilized infrastructure through data mining, driving cost savings and resource optimization.
Built automated reporting workflows and interactive dashboards using Python libraries like matplotlib and plotly.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics for Brand.com, ensuring performance data analysis for critical systems.
Led 'FAST' project to data-mine real-user performance metrics, providing optimization recommendations.
Supported cloud migration to AWS, enhancing operational efficiency through tool upgrades.
Upgraded DynaTrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and implemented TLS1.2 security protocols.
Provided end-to-end monitoring and dashboarding for performance metrics.
Analyzed bottlenecks and suggested actionable performance improvements.

experience.title: APM Consultant
bullets: Supported enterprise CA APM, CEM, and ADA for utility systems, ensuring reliable performance data.
Managed and supported monitoring solutions to maintain operational efficiency.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)

Provided sizing recommendations and Golden Images for agent rollouts.
Developed Perl/Ksh scripts for data extraction and customized reporting.
Trained client teams on APM solutions, fostering cross-functional collaboration.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications for load and breakpoints, supporting data-driven performance decisions.
Documented key metrics like JDBC connections, threads, memory, and CPU usage for optimization.
Installed JMX, Thread Dumps, and Wily Introscope for monitoring purposes.
Created automation scripts to streamline performance testing processes.

Built CPPUNIT testing framework to automate conversion and validation processes.
Enhanced operational efficiency through data migration and system refactoring.
